title: Implement BMC/BIOS layer tests (firmware management interface testing)
description: Implement the BMC/BIOS layer test module for testing server firmware management interfaces including: IPMI sensor readings, Redfish API tests, BIOS configuration validation, firmware update testing, and SEL (System Event Log) tests. This layer validates the firmware management infrastructure.

criteria: IPMI tests can read sensor data (temperature, voltage, fan speed) and validate against expected ranges
Redfish API tests cover: GET/PATCH /Systems, /Chassis, /Managers endpoints and validate response schema
BIOS configuration tests verify BIOS setting values match expected configuration profiles
Firmware update tests in src/layers/bmc/firmware.py produce: flash_progress_percent property, rollback_detected boolean, version string from get_firmware_version() method after update
SEL tests verify event logging, log clearing, and alert configuration via src/layers/bmc/sel.py SelManager class
BMC layer accesses hardware context via LayerContext.parent reference to HardwareLayer for integrated testing
convergence.verification: Run pytest tests/bmc/ -v and verify all BMC/BIOS tests execute with mock or real BMC

implementation: Create BMCLayer class implementing LayerProtocol with access to parent hardware context
Implement IpmiClient abstract class and MockIpmiClient for testing
Implement IpmiTests: sensor_reading_validation, sdr_dump_parsing, sel_listing, raw_command_execution, user_management
Implement RedfishClient abstract class and MockRedfishClient using aiosfinit for testing
Implement RedfishTests: systems_endpoint_get, chassis_endpoint_get, managers_endpoint_get, patch_operation, schema_validation
Implement BiosConfigTests: setting_enumeration, setting_value_validation, profile_export_import, secure_boot_status, tpm_status
Implement FirmwareTests: flash_progress_tracking, rollback_detection, bic_update_validation, bios_update_with_recovery, version_verification_post_update
Implement SelTests: event_log_enumeration, event_timestamp_validation, log_clear_operation, alert_configuration (PET/SNMP/email), SEL overflow handling
Create BMCClientFactory for creating appropriate client based on BMC type (Dell iDRAC, HP iLO, Lenovo XCC, generic IPMI)
Write comprehensive unit tests for each BMC module using mock clients
Implement integration tests connecting to mock BMC for end-to-end validation

success_metrics: tests run with mock BMC client

reference.pattern: Layer protocol from TASK-001, client abstraction pattern
